about.title: Who is Zhongfei Groupe?
about.desc1: Founded with a vision to revolutionize digital commerce and mobility, Zhongfei Groupe has grown into a multi-dimensional technology company serving millions of users across 100+ countries.
about.desc2: We believe in the power of technology to solve real-world problems. Our integrated ecosystem creates seamless experiences for merchants, consumers, and service providers.
